entry.title: Re: A demo to consume MySQL database in Datasphere with Generic JDBC connection
entry.content: Note: Make sure to restart the agent after installing the driver.

entry.title: Re: could not find Entity for Unit of Measure grp(MEGRP)...
entry.content:
Hi, 

If I understand correctly, you are referring to the MEGRP field from table T006M. This field is not part of a master data table but serves as a reference for customizing material master data to streamline the maintenance of quantity units within material master records. It is not included in the MM data model, and I am not aware of an equivalent functionality provided by SAP's within MDG. I assume that extending the UNITOFMSR entity, configuring the UI, and writing custom derivations within either the USMD_RULE_SERVICE BAdI or utilizing DQM derivation scenarios would be necessary to replicate this functionality as closely as possible to SAP's standard.

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content: Hi @Jelena_Perfiljeva, any update on this? Please let us know if it works (or as well if not), this is valuable information, and I would be happy to know if it works 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to progress on adding Variant Management to my ui5 app
entry.content: Hi @Jayanth_Kumar85! Could you share how did you solve your problem?

entry.title: Hello!
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community! 

I'm Emerson, a 55-year-old system architect with experience in ERP since 1993 in Brazil.

I joined the SAP universe in February 2025, and I'm working to connect my previous experience with SAP technologies.

My strongest background is in the construction industry. I've delivered projects across various sectors, including railroads, ports, hospitals, schools, commercial buildings, and oil & gas sites.

In construction, the state-of-the-art for information management is called BIM – Building Information Modeling. It's a structured database that stores all relevant information about a construction object, such as a building or an oil rig.

Companies in this industry face challenges in managing versions, changes, access controls, and many other attributes required to track the full lifecycle of construction projects.

Can I use SAP Lifecycle Management tools to support this kind of process?

Thanks a lot!

P.S.: Please forgive any mistakes in my English — it's a work in progress!

entry.title: Re: Fetch Delta Records from Multiple Entities in SuccessFactors Using OData API and Groovy Script
entry.content:
Rasesh:

Excellent article. I have used compound to review deltas, but the Odata is much more efficient.

Mark

entry.title: Can we add new custom catlog apart from standard one
entry.content: We have a option of six type of catlog(Object part,diamage,causes,Activities,Task,Coading) in notification, can we add new one customize catlog. by our own choice.

entry.title: Re: Python FOR loop does'nt work fine
entry.content:
Hi Vitaliy-R

Here is my code: 

def transform(data):
    """
    This function body should contain all the desired transformations on incoming DataFrame. Permitted builtin functions
    as well as permitted NumPy and Pandas objects and functions are available inside this function.
    Permitted NumPy and Pandas objects and functions can be used with aliases 'np' and 'pd' respectively.
    This function executes in a sandbox mode. Please refer the documentation for permitted objects and functions. Using
    any restricted functions or objects would cause an internal exception and result in a pipeline failure.
    Any code outside this function body will not be executed and inclusion of such code is discouraged.
    :param data: Pandas DataFrame
    :return: Pandas DataFrame
    """
    #####################################################
    # Provide the function body for data transformation #
    #####################################################
    data["HIERCUST1"] = ""
    data["HIERCUST2"] = ""
    data["HIERCUST3"] = ""
    data["HIERCUST4"] = ""
    data["HIERCUST5"] = "" 

	H = int(0)
    H1 = int(0)
    nb_ind = int(0)
    w_cust = ""

    #---------------------------------------------------------------------
    #   Noeuds sans parents, tête de hierarchie niveau 1
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------
    data.sort_values('HKUNNR')
    
    for i in range(data.shape[0]):
        if data['HKUNNR'][i] == "":
            nb_ind = nb_ind + 1
        
    ind = np.arange(nb_ind)
    
    #-----Création d'une table temporaire pour les entetes de hierarchie
    
    data_h = pd.DataFrame(columns=['KUNNR'], index = ind)
    
    #-----Alimentation de la table de têtes de hierarchie
    
    for i in range(data.shape[0]):
        if data['HKUNNR'][i] == "":
            data.loc[i,'HIERCUST1'] = data['KUNNR'][i]

            new_row = 'KUNNR':data['KUNNR'][i]
            data_h.loc[len(data_h)] = new_row
			

    #---------------------------------------------------------------------
    #   Hierarchie niveau 2, enfants tête de hierarchie niveau 1
    #---------------------------------------------------------------------
  
    data.sort_values('KUNNR')
    data_h.sort_values('KUNNR')
    
    """    
    for i, row in data.iterrows():
        if row ['HKUNNR'] == "0001010970":
            data.loc[i,'HIERCUST1'] = row ['HKUNNR']
            data.loc[i,'HIERCUST2'] = row ['KUNNR']
    

    for j in list(range(0, len(data_h))):
    #for j, row in data_h.iterrows():
    #    w_cust = row ['KUNNR']

        w_cust = "0001010970"
        for i, row in data.iterrows():
            data.loc[i,'HIERCUST4'] = w_cust
            
            if row ['HKUNNR'] == w_cust:
                data.loc[i,'HIERCUST1'] = row ['HKUNNR']
                data.loc[i,'HIERCUST2'] = row ['KUNNR']
    
    """
   
    #----------------------------SAP forum-----------
    
    for _, row_h in data_h.iterrows():
        w_cust = row_h['KUNNR']

    # Boolean mask for matching HKUNN
        mask = data['HKUNNR'] == w_cust

    # Conditional assignments only where the mask is True
        data.loc[mask, 'HIERCUST1'] = data.loc[mask, 'HKUNNR']
        data.loc[mask, 'HIERCUST2'] = data.loc[mask, 'KUNNR']
        data.loc[mask, 'HIERCUST4'] = w_cust
		
	#----------------------------SAP forum end-------
	
    return data

As you can see, there is no filter... 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Databricks is now GA. Get the most of it skilling yourself with Mosaic AI
entry.content:
Hi @nick_leeson 

Understand SAP BDC as an end-destination. SAP Databricks is an orbital solution that we use, then return back to BDC and its "Data Products".

If you want to extract data out of SAP domains you will need to use Datasphere Premium Outbound Integration.

That said, it was informed that later this 2025 SAP could release a Delta Share connector that will enable zero copy integration between existing Databricks deployments and SAP BDC.

Please note that the data was uploaded ,that data not in SAP

entry.title: Re: Auto populate Acct.Assign.Category and settlement rec...
entry.content:
Hi Rajeswari,

To default the Account Assignment Category (e.g., 'WBS') and the Settlement Receiver (WBS element from the Service Order header) in the Manage Settlement Rules app, follow this approach:

 Standard Behaviour (Public Cloud):

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, when a WBS element is assigned in the Service Order header and the order is released, the system can propose the WBS as a default settlement receiver,  but only if the correct configuration and master data linkage exist.

 Steps to Enable Defaulting:

Assign WBS Element in Service Order Header:

Ensure the WBS is assigned and active before release (status: Released).

Configure Settlement Profile:

  • Go to “Manage Your Solution” → SSCUI: 102570 – Define Settlement Profile.
  • Ensure the profile allows settlement to WBS (Account Assignment Category 'WBS').
  • Assign the settlement profile to the Service Order Type (via SSCUI: 102571).

Let me know if you know it helps.

Thanks, with regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Available Budget for a WBS element in SAP Odata
entry.content:
Hello

S_ALR_87013558 is not available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, as classic SAP GUI reports are unsupported.
To retrieve the available budget for a WBS element, use the “Project Cost Report” app or create a custom CDS view to calculate budget minus actuals and commitments. Expose this through a custom OData service to integrate with your external interface.

Thanks and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Start and End Pages of a Simulation appear blank in p...
entry.content:
Hi Sanchia,

If the templates used to create the Start and End pages are published, please raise an SAP support ticket to get support to take a closer look.  I cannot think of any other reason that the page appears, without content.  Please use the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR when raising the ticket.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: WHY IS MY BOOK PAGE TEXT CHANGING WHEN THE BOOK IS EX...
entry.content:
Hi Barb,

When you apply manual formatting to text in Enable Now that manual formatting is typically retained no matter whether you move the content between Workspaces or generate the content as documentation.  I just tested this in my Cloud demo environment and found that the formatting is definitely copied across into the new Workspace.  In the image below, you can see the manual formatting still applied to text in the new Workspace.

 

 

 

 

 

 

In one of the Book Pages that you think has an issue, open the Book Page in Producer in the new Workspace.  Then click on a text box to start editing that text and click the Source button on the bottom, left corner of the editing dialog box.  The manual formatting codes should still be applied to your text.  If they are not, please raise a support ticket using Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content:
Hi, 

if you're using oData v4 you can use the filter directly on the expand like this example:

to something like: parameters: { expand: 'to_Description($filter=Language eq \'EN\')' }

if its oData v2 I would say to use a formatter or a expression binding on the column itself to transform it in 1:1 relantionship.

Hope it helps,
Ludgero

entry.title: Re: What is mean EDI?

entry.title: Re: EDI Basic Questions
entry.content: Here are some details about SAP EDI Vendor integration: https://www.contax.com/Knowledge-Center-Blogs?BGID=158

entry.title: Re: Scope Item 5W2 and Intercompany Scope Items like 1WO
entry.content:
Hello Sebastian,

Scope 5W2 is incompatible with classic ICO scenario 1P9,2TS,1HO,1MX,1WO and 2F4 and are not allowed with 5W2. For 5W2 the pre-requisite ICO scope in 5D2 and 5HP instead. The classic ICO SIs are excluded since intercompany elimination posting logic in the Group Valuation ledger only works on the advanced ICO processes, not the classic ones.

Please refer note 3093830 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Release Restriction Note for Group Valuation - SAP for Me

Also because the trigger for the elimination is based on the new intercompany sales order/purchase order (the value chain manager). The system can't identify the old intercompany stock transfers as needing to be eliminated. Only the new processes support the Value Chain correctly, the old ones never did.

Best Regards,

Owen, on behalf of SAP content

entry.title: Re: Name change event in Intelligent Services
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

Please kindly have a look at KBA 3505889 - Supported scenarios for triggering ISC Events - Employee Central

Currently, Personal Information Model is not supported to trigger ISC events.

 

Please raise your requirement according to 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products

 

Hope the answer helps.

Best regards, Ashley

entry.title: FAGLF101-error as “Field BSEG-DMBE3. does not exist in DYNPRO SAPMF05A 0330” through SM35 BDC sessio
entry.content:
In S4J and S4D systems– FAGLF101 transaction is Giving error as “Field BSEG-DMBE3. does not exist in DYNPRO SAPMF05A 0330” when executed through SM35 session.

 

Please Note:

  1. We have NOT defined currency type 30 as "3rd FI Currency" in FINSC_Ledger transaction.
  2. S4J system is on "SAP 2021 version" and S4D system is recently upgraded to "2023 version support pack 108".

entry.title: How to configure late Coming and Early Leaving in SuccessFactors TimeSheet/TimeTracking?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on Timesheet/Time-Tracking.

I have below scenarios, could anyone help me with the configuration please. We are following Clock based work schedules. We also have Time Tracking in place.

Late Coming Scenario:

  1. The Grace period is 15 mins.
  2. If the employee is coming after 15 minutes and up to 2 hours this will be considered as late coming, We should have a time valuation to capture these late comings.
  3. If the employee is coming after 2 hours up to 4 hours, this will be considered as half day absence. We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.
  4. If the employee is coming after 4 hours, this will be considered as full day absence. We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.

Early Leaving Scenario:

  1. Grace period is 5 mins.
  2. If the employee is leaving before 5 minutes and up to 2 hours this will be considered as early leaving, We should have a time valuation to capture these early leavings.
  3. If the employee is leaving before 2 hours and up to 4 hours this will be considered as half day absence, We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.
  4. If the employee is leaving before 4 hours this will be considered as full day absence, We should have a time valuation to capture these full day absences.

Based on the above valuations HR will deduct the leave balance manually every month. Here the month is from 20th to 19th. (Ex April 20th to May 19th).

Please suggest me how to configure the above requirement.

Regards

Hafeez

We are implementing business configuration app as an alternative for SM30 following clean core approach by SAP and we are not sure which settings controls the editing behaviour in the production and QA systems.
Please suggest us in this

entry.title: SAP CAP - How to Set Attribute Type as Integer When Mocking User in package.json?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently mocking a user in my package.json for local testing in a CAP project, like this:

 

"gabriel": {
  "password": "@Teste123",
  "roles": ["AMS"],
  "attr": {
    "ams": "1"
  }
}

In the restrict rule, I need to compare the ams attribute as an integer:

{
  grant: ['READ'],
  to   : ['FORNECEDOR', 'TRANSPORTADOR', 'AMS'],
  where: '( CriadoPor = $user or Transportadora = $user ) or $user.AMS = 1'
}

This works fine in the deployed environment, where xs-security.json defines the ams attribute like this:

 
"attributes": [
  {
    "name": "ams",
    "description": "ams",
    "valueType": "int"
  }
]

However, during local development, the mocked ams attribute is always treated as a string (e.g., "1"), and the comparison with the integer 1 in the where clause fails.

Is there a way to define the type of a mocked attribute as int in package.json, or any workaround to handle this locally?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Sales Return on the basis of Tax Invoice in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Mr Sahil, Thanks for replying,

Actually my client deals with MSIL company and they are getting back from MSIL( MSIL return the material but they are issuing Tax invoice against the material return, Now how my client will do this return process into the system.For Ex:

Client send material to MSIL with Invoice, then due to the product damage MSIL will return the material back to the client and issue Tax invoice against it.

So firstly how my client will do Entry into the system? and secondly how my client will send this material to there supplier? Please advise

Thanks

Mani Sajnani

We have a business requirement wherein the client sells third party licenses and subscriptions.  Given that these are not physical stocks, I would like to request advice from the community on how the procurement process will be so that client can sell this subscription/license.

Thanks,

Camille

entry.title: Issue with History Log for Profit Segment Fields in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have an issue with the history log of all the fields in the Profit segment of the Sales order.

For example, on client110:
SO 1500000036
Item SO > Sheet Account Assignment > Profit Segment
I made a change to the "Sales Office" field, updating it from BT0 to YL5. However, I am unable to find the history log under Environment > Change.

Could you please help me check? Is it possible to view the history log for these fields?

entry.title: Transformation logic for SCD Type 2 in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello SAP Datasphere experts,

I am fairly new to SAP Datasphere and trying to find out and implement slowly changing dimension type2 in data sphere for the cost center object with Zemployee as an attribute. So if the employee change his department and belongs to a different cost center then it should keep the history.

I created a source table Sourec_CostCenter and Target table Target ZDIM_CostCenter_SCD2

I have all the required fields such as Cost center employee, from and To date, Flag and Record ID but I dont know where should I write or configure and option for SCD type 2. I was told to do it in the transformation but I cant even find the place or transformation where I can configure a logic for SCD type 2.

Can anyone please help me with the screenshot where to write/configure SCDtype2 settings and where do i find this transformation interface.

Will appreciate your help.

 

Regards

entry.title: SAP SNOW INTEGARATION INBOUND IDOC using CREMAS Msg.typ require failure or success status to SNOW
entry.content:
Hi, there is a requirement in the ECC system where SAP is integrated with SNOW via BTP CPI-PI.  When an Inbound IDOC is received from SNOW to SAP.  Present SNOW gets <TransferId> and <DbId> as a response whether the IDOC status is success or failure. SNOW is expecting the IDOC status with message details from SAP.  

I think it is achievable using SYSTAT01 (SAPs standard status iDoc). Can anyone suggest the steps required from the ABAP side to send the status back when an IDOC received?

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @matthias_schmalz 

Yes, the app is deployed in the HTML5 repository and is not launched via Workzone.
However, since we are using the provider-consumer model, all the HTML5 apps must be deployed in the provider subaccount, while they are accessed and launched from the consumer subaccount.
Then, with this kinnof setup, can I still embed my reusable component into the main app?

entry.title: Custom MDK code for barcode reading logic is not working on Zebra scanner device in SSAM 2410
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have upgraded SSAM to 2410 and the enhancements we've made for the Inventory Clerk persona. Specifically, we've implemented functionality that reads concatenated barcodes formatted as (Plant/SLoc/Material) and updates the corresponding fields in GI, GR, and PI screens. The enhancement has been successfully tested and is working as expected on both iOS and Android devices.

However, our client has now decided to switch to using Android Zebra scanner devices instead of the previously mentioned iOS/Android devices. Unfortunately, we are encountering an issue where the concatenated barcode reading is not functioning properly on the Zebra scanner devices.

Could anyone assist us in resolving this issue? Your expertise and support would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

bill froelich   jitendra kansal

@ArunachalamPonnurangam

Thanks
Madhukar G

entry.title: Re: 2505 C4C Release Content
entry.content: SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 Release Briefing - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: While creating a sales order I am getting an error as...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel_AC,

Please note that according to our Rules of Engagement: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag  GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content." We have edited your answer and added the GenAI-statement as we detected AI-generated content in your post. Thank you for your contribution in the SAP Community!

Best regards, 

Kavya

entry.title: Mitigated risk assigned to a position does not reflect to the user level analysis
entry.content: The requirement is to whoever occupies the position (HR object) which has risk that has been mitigated should also reflect in User Level Analysis.

entry.title: R2/AM-ISP/Build-System Status is not NOCO but Success Message pop-up is appearing as completed Sav
entry.content:
When setting any Notification to complete the NOCO is not successful because of failures in the custom validations which are done in the SAP provided customer exit EXIT_SAPLIQS0_001 include ZXWOCU10.

Even though the NOCO is not set the standard class CL_EAMS_BO_NOTIF, method SAVE adds a success message without checking the Notification NOCO status.

Can you help?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Manage characterstics as custom fields in Fiori apps

please check your system cloud version.

Ninad

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS - SAP Business Data Cloud - Driving Innovation (Virtual, May 15, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

May 15, 2025

Agenda

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop focusing on SAP Business Data Cloud – Driving Innovation Across Data Landscapes”, taking place virtually on May 15th, 2025. Please find the current agenda here.

SAP Business Data Cloud (SAP BDC) is at the core of SAP’s modern data strategy, designed to transform how businesses manage, connect, and extract value from data. This interactive session will explore how customers can unlock agility, enable AI, and drive innovation by modernizing their data landscapes.

We will showcase:

  • Customer challenges and how SAP BDC addresses fragmented and siloed data.
  • Real-world experience from Henkel as an early adopter.
  • How AI and insight apps are embedded into BDC to enhance data usage.
  • Transition paths from classic BW and BW/4HANA to SAP BDC, including hybrid scenarios.
  • Partner ecosystems, reusable data products, and BDC object store innovations.

SAP MaxAttention services that support and safeguard your transformation journey.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Integration of Joule with IAS for SAP SuccessFactors and S4 HANA: Procedure and Impact
entry.content:

Could you please provide the procedure if this integration is possible? If not, what alternatives do we have?

What will be the impact on the systems and data in both scenarios?

entry.title: Can the Inventory valuation for sales order stock be changed from "M" to "A" in Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Dears,

For sales order stock (E stock), normally the inventory valuation is separated with the normal inventory stock.  For example, using moving average price, the sales order stock price will be different with the normal inventory moving average price.

Our requirement, even using sales order stock, we still want to use the same moving average price with the normal inventory stock.

In SAP OP version, by transaction code OVZG, we can change the account assignment group from M to A, then the valuation will be changed to A as well. A means "Valuation without reference to sales document".

But in SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edition, we cannot find the configuration path for this one, is it allowed to be changed in Public Cloud version 2502? Or need to activate some special scope item?

Thanks for your help in advance.

entry.title: Re: Consuming complex Datasphere models

entry.title: Re: Manage characterstics as custom fields in Fiori apps

You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: CDPOS, CDHDR, SM19, SM20 Logs Confirmation
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Share the following  logs for both application and database levels:

1.

Whether each of the above software have feature (Application & Database Level):
- When changes were made
- Who made those changes
- What data was changed
- Whether all changes are logged and not just the last changes
- Whether the audit trail is stored on server located in India
- Whether audit trail covers all type of transactions

(Change include creating new data, deleting, updating data)

We want =  Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

2. 

User IDs used for changes are assigned to each individual and that User IDs are not shared.

We want = Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

 

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.content: Solution was found. Question is closed.

entry.title: Re: TARGET and SOURCE are not replaced for qRFC, tRFC, ID...
entry.content:
Hi Mikhail,

The first two screenshots appear to be related to the Solution and Logical Component Group in Solution Manager. The third screenshot seems to pertain to the Interface Monitoring configuration. Unfortunately, there is no option in the current solution manager interface monitoring settings to perform a mass update for tRFC, qRFC, or IDOC monitoring types. Are the ERP and S/4HANA merged in the LMDB after the system migration? Or if they are treated as different systems in the solman? If they are treated as different systems, I recommend reconfiguring the Interface Monitoring (ICMON). 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Cancel Mat Doc Error - Deficit of MCHB-CLABS 24,956 L...
entry.content:
Hello @ShivamL 

I guess you are trying to cancel a receipt. Such a cancellation is effectively a stock issue. The message says that you don't have enough stock on: 

  • material: 4600021186
  • plant: 5065
  • storage location: U007
  • batch: 9203171001

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Nitesh

entry.title: Re: Different Budgets - just one should be visible
entry.content: Thank you a lot!! 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to use nested $filter inside $expand while workin...
entry.content:
Using a function in the columns selector allows you to use additional functions deeper in the query. So you can plug a 'where()' clause anywhere on your expands. Below 'where' should only be applied to the 'b.promotion' expand. See also CAP docs.

 

const results = await remote.run(
  SELECT.from(BusinessUnitAssignments)
    .columns(b => {
      b.businessUnitID,
      b.promotion(p => {
        p.promotionID,
        p.promotionPriceDerivationRules(r => {
          r.promotionPriceDerivationRuleID
        })
      }).where(
        { statusCode: 'AC', and: { filterBuId: 'CZP1%7C2B' } }
      )
    })
    .where({
      businessUnitID: CustomerID,
    })
)

 

The 'query-by-example' syntax of this where clause can get a bit complex/confusing, so it's also possible to write as a templated string. You won't have auto-completion and type checking on that level anymore so there is no real difference apart from readability:

.where( `statusCode = 'AC' and filterBuId = 'CZP1%7C2B'` )

entry.title: remove customizing from OABC
entry.content:
hi,

we did some customizing for depreciation area for investment measures by accident in OABC. But we cannot remove it by error AC528. setting it to warning in OBA5 doesn't help.

How can we remove the wrong customizing?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Re: How to turn off the 'Add Comments | Refactor' automat...
entry.content:
Hi Mihaly,

I am happy to update you that a new setting is available since yesterday in productive landscapes. Uncheck it to turn off  'Add Comments | Refactor' actions.

Regards,

Rima

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management - Fiori Application...
entry.content: That's right - LE-WM custom titles will work with Stock Room Management, as it's is just LE-WM in disguise.

Patricia

entry.title: SAP Business One Delivery Note and Serialnumber History
entry.content:
Hello together,

i am working on an Integration for a Ticket System with SAP Business One. I already have some integrations working like syncing orders or invoices, which is all done via the B1 Service Layer Rest API.

I am stuck on a serialnumber search for delivery notes or invoices. It seems that there are not any options via the API so i tried fetching the data directly from the database.

What i am looking is something like the serial number transaction view. When you are in an delivery note you can go to serial transactions and see what and where that serialnumber was connected to.

I cannot replicate that via API or SQL.

This is the best i have done:

 

SELECT 
    OSRI.ItemCode,
	OSRI.ItemName,
    OSRI.IntrSerial,
    OSRI.SuppSerial,
    OSRI.CreateDate,
	OSRI.Direction,
    OSRI.BaseType,
    OSRI.BaseEntry,
    OSRI.BaseNum
FROM 
    OSRI
WHERE 
    OSRI.SuppSerial = 'MYSERIAL'
ORDER BY 
    OSRI.CreateDate

The least i would need is to find delivery notes on where a specifc serialnumber is linked to.

entry.title: Re: Which BAPI can be used to Tick the "Delivery Complete...
entry.content: Dear Raymond, Can you please send me the screenshot on how to provide the input details in the BAPI "BAPI_PROCORDCONF_CREATE_TT".

entry.title: Re: Linked Analysis not working
entry.content:
Hello @Torbjorn,

To be honest I don't remember if I managed to resolve that one but I know there are some limitations: https://me.sap.com/notes/3315721/E .

And sometimes it's just not working for no reason, then you access it again and it works. You should use this functionality: "Filter on data point selection". 

Also you can open a ticket to SAP, sometimes it helps because it can be a bug.

Good luck!

entry.title: Re: MTO and return order material value
entry.content:
Hi varadha,

when you are following the MTO, cost of product is determined by strategy based on your configuration. Based on strategy first preference is given to sales order specific cost estimate. If sales order specific cost estimate is not available then cost from the material master is taken into consideration. The return order should also have the cost estimate with status VO. Then the goods are taken at sales order value. Ask your SD consultant to check the copy controls on return order and ensure cost estimate exists on the returns order. The cost of returns should be typically same as original sales order unless there is change in raw material or activity cost changes.

For your second question, once the item is received as sales order stock, it is blocked stock for sales order. Move it unblocked stock and reassign the stock to other sales order.

 

Regards

Satish

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

Hi All,

entry.title: Re: Settlement document - multiple tax codes
entry.content:
Hi Gauthier,

thx for your comments. I think from all of your points only transfer manager could cause this behavior.

Do you have any sepcial transfer group in mind? I cant find anything in our config that manipulates the MWKS2 (WBRP)

And how would the logic actually be if we have two tax codes? Would the MWSK2 field be empty? I tried to forcfully clear the MWSK2 field with transfer manager by transfering a "fixed value" but when I put "0" it makes the tax code actually "0" and system gives a tax error.

Any additional infos you might have to share here?

Many thx!

BR Jan

entry.title: Execute same SFC on multiple resources of a WorkCentre in SAP DM
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Requirement: To execute same SFC on multiple resources of a WorkCentre.

The client scenario involves starting Order A for 100 Qty on Resource A. However, during execution, they intend to utilize both Resource A and Resource B to complete the full 100 Qty—without splitting the SFCs.

Observation:

  1. We started an SFC with 100 Qty at Resource A and were unable to perform partial confirmation at Resource B.
  2. When attempting a labor-on at Resource B, the time tracking still reflects activity under Resource A.

    Open Points / Clarifications Needed:

    1. Can we utilize both Resources A and B to execute single SFC without splitting?
    2. Can we perform partial or full confirmation (Yield & Scrap) from Resource B if the SFC was started at Resource A?
    3. Is it possible to log labor-on at Resource B if the SFC was initiated at Resource A?
    4. In ERP, the standard rate is defined per resource and per Work Center. Since both Resource A and B are being utilized in a single Work Center, how can we define the standard rate for both so we obtain accurate OEE data?
    5. Is there is any way to disable/ delete the existing default resource of workcenter or don’t show in POD selection to user?

      Regards,

      Utkarsh

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere license just to consume data in SAC
entry.content:
Yes, you need a DSP user to be able to access, as this is how security is managed.
If the user does NOT need to access the DSP environment and only needs to consume data, there is a CONSUMER role that does exactly that.

SAC and DSP must use the same identity provider and be configured with SAML2 to enable Single Sign-On. This way, once the user is authenticated in SAC, they can access DSP without having to re-enter their username and password.

From a financial perspective, there is no additional cost since user licenses in DSP are free, and as mentioned, DSP is billed based on CUs (memory, CPU, etc.).

Regards,

entry.title: Customer wants to allocate advance against the invoice
entry.content: While doing the invoice, is there any way to automatically adjust the advance with the invoice amount? Is there any way to do it?

entry.title: Re: Error While Marking Delivery Completion Indicator On PO

Seems the given error message is a custom message.
So you may check with your technical team (ABAP) to verify the Issue.

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @swati_suman2 

this is a different aspect. First your app and reuse component are deployed to the same space and running standalone on managed app router.
Next is that your app is multi tenant/SaaS enabled and subscribed to another sub account. 

How to enable an application for SaaS subscription is not described in this blog. Please have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/developing-multitenant-applications-in-cloud-foundry-environment?version=Cloud

Best regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: Can the Inventory valuation for sales order stock be...
entry.content:
Hello @Grace_Li 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2502), account assignment group configuration (e.g., OVZG) for valuation control between sales order stock (E-stock) and standard stock is not accessible, as IMG-level configuration is restricted in Public Cloud.

Solution
To apply the same moving average price (MAP) for both sales order stock and normal stock, you must:

  • Use valuation without reference to sales order (Account Assignment Group = 'A').
  • This setting is controlled by the "Item Category/Requirement Class" combination delivered via pre-configured scope items (e.g., BD9—Sell from Stock).

Let me know if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: HANA Vector Engine and LangChain
entry.content: Right now, the plug-in support HANA Cloud standalone as a vector database. There are no plans yet - that I am aware of - to include Generative AI Hub.
